page_content:
MUSC226 Vocal Diction: French (1 Credit)

Augmentation of private voice study. Phonetics and diction for singers of French vocal literature.

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Restriction: Must be in a major within ARHU-School of Music department.

MUSC227 Vocal Diction: German (1 Credit)

Augmentation of private study. Phonetics and diction for singers of German vocal literature.

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Restriction: Must be in a major within ARHU-School of Music department.
